arts.ttl: 'Nothing changes for us': Reading boss addresses takeover talk amid exclusivity deal
arts.sum: Reading boss Noel Hunt has admitted that some of his players are walking around with bigger smiles on their faces than usual following the news that the club are in exclusive talks with a new potential owner. Up for sale for over 18 months, the Royals have battled against the odds to remain in with a chance of promotion under Dai Yongge, currently just three points outside the play-offs heading into a trip to Wigan Athletic on Saturday. On Monday, the club confirmed that exclusive talks were underway over a 'quick' end to negotiations, with the Reading Chronicle revealing that this was American investor Robert Platek.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Reading - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Reading, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief provides updates on Chris Sze, James Carragher, Joseph Hungo and Maleace Asamoah
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has welcomed back forward Chris Sze following a prolonged absence - and admits Wigan Athletic 'have missed him' up top.
